description: Supabase dashboard - Storage / Files explorer page showing bucket management and file listing interface

components.name: FileListTable
components.description: Data table displaying storage buckets with columns for icon, name, policies, file size limit, and allowed MIME types. Supports hover states and row selection.
components.htmlSample:
IconNamePoliciesFile size limitAllowed MIME typesActions
my-bucket
components.notes: Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with custom Supabase color tokens. Supports sticky headers for horizontal scrolling.

components.name: StorageNavigation
components.description: Navigation component for Storage section with tabs for Files, Buckets, Settings, and Policies. Provides context-aware routing.
components.htmlSample:
• Files
  • Buckets
  • Settings
  • Policies
components.notes: Part of the main sidebar navigation. Uses aria-label for accessibility.

components.name: CreateBucketModal
components.description: Modal dialog for creating a new file storage bucket. Includes form fields for bucket name, file size restrictions, and MIME type filtering.
components.htmlSample: Create file bucket
components.notes: Uses Radix UI primitives for dialog behavior. Background has backdrop blur effect.

components.name: FileInput
components.description: HTML file input element for uploading files. Part of the bucket creation form with styling for file upload button appearance.
components.htmlSample: <input type="file" class="file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-foreground-lighter" data-form-type="other" data-bwignore="true"/>
components.notes: Styled with Tailwind's file pseudo-element classes. Used within form contexts.

components.name: PageHeader
components.description: Page title and description section for the Files page. Displays 'Files' as heading with descriptive text about storage functionality.
components.htmlSample:
Files

General file storage for your project
components.notes: Uses Supabase heading utility classes for consistent typography.

components.name: BucketIcon
components.description: SVG icon representing a storage bucket. Used in table rows and navigation elements throughout the Storage interface.
components.htmlSample: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-files-bucket" aria-label="bucket icon"><path d="M3.99988 20H19.9999C20.5303 20 21.039 19.7893 21.4141 19.4142C21.7892 19.0391 21.9999 18.5304 21.9999 18V8C21.9999 7.46957 21.7892 6.96086 21.4141 6.58579C21.039 6.21071 20.5303 6 19.9999 6H12.0699"/></svg>
components.notes: Uses Lucide icon library. Stroke width: 1.5, renders at 16x16px in tables.

components.name: ActionMenuButton
components.description: Small dropdown button in table rows for bucket actions (edit, delete, etc). Uses chevron-down icon.
components.notes: Part of table row actions. Integrates with dropdown menu pattern via aria-haspopup.
